notes: Multivariate cointegration basket (rolling multi-OLS Johansen analogue, >=3 legs). Default FX 4-leg EU(host)/GU/AU/NU; index legs NDX/WS30 for a separate setfile instance. Host leg via framework magic; partner legs via QM_BasketOpenPosition at their slots; both/all legs open+close together; warmup via QM_SymbolGuardInit+QM_BasketWarmupHistory. Closed-form estimators only, NO ML, no external feed. All legs in dwx_symbol_matrix.csv.
